{"tool":"readFile","path":"ui.lua","content":"/home/HL/.config/nvim/nvim/lua/plugins/ui.lua"}

I can see the auto-open NvimTree setting at the end of the file. It's in the config function of the nvim-tree.lua plugin, specifically the condition:
```lua
if vim.fn.argc(-1) == 0 then
  vim.cmd("NvimTreeFocus")
end
```
I'll remove this part while keeping all other configurations intact.
I see that my previous attempt to remove the auto-open setting was not successful. Let me try again with the correct file content.

{"tool":"readFile","path":"/home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/config/autocmds.lua","content":"/home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/config/autocmds.lua"}

{"request":"[read_file for '../../../lua/config/autocmds.lua'] Result:

-- Autocmds are automatically loaded on the VeryLazy event
-- Default autocmds that are always set: https://github.com/LazyVim/LazyVim/blob/main/lua/lazyvim/config/autocmds.lua
-- Add any additional autocmds here

vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd({ "TermOpen", "WinEnter" }, {
  callback = function()
    if vim.opt.buftype:get() == "terminal" then
      vim.cmd("set nonu")
      vim.cmd("set norelativenumber")
      vim.cmd("startinsert")
    end
  end,
})

{"request":"[read_file for '../../../lua/config/lazy.lua'] Result:

local lazypath = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/lazy/lazy.nvim"
if not (vim.uv or vim.loop).fs_stat(lazypath) then
  local lazyrepo = "https://github.com/folke/lazy.nvim.git"
  local out = vim.fn.system({ "git", "clone", "--filter=blob:none", "--branch=stable", lazyrepo, lazypath })
  if vim.v.shell_error ~= 0 then
    vim.api.nvim_echo({
      { "Failed to clone lazy.nvim:\n", "ErrorMsg" },
      { out, "WarningMsg" },
      { "\nPress any key to exit..." },
    }, true, {})
    vim.fn.getchar()
    os.exit(1)
  end
end
vim.opt.rtp:prepend(lazypath)

require("lazy").setup({
  spec = {
    -- add LazyVim and import its plugins
    { "LazyVim/LazyVim", import = "lazyvim.plugins" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.linting.eslint" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.formatting.prettier" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.lang.typescript" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.lang.json" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.lang.tailwind" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.coding.copilot" },
    { import = "lazyvim.plugins.extras.util.mini-hipatterns" },
    { import = "plugins" },
  },

  defaults = {
    -- By default, only LazyVim plugins will be lazy-loaded. Your custom plugins will load during startup.
    -- If you know what you're doing, you can set this to `true` to have all your custom plugins lazy-loaded by default.
    lazy = false,
    -- It's recommended to leave version=false for now, since a lot the plugin that support versioning,
    -- have outdated releases, which may break your Neovim install.
    version = false, -- always use the latest git commit
    -- version = "*", -- try installing the latest stable version for plugins that support semver
  },
  install = { colorscheme = { "tokyonight", "habamax" } },
  checker = {
    enabled = true, -- check for plugin updates periodically
    notify = false, -- notify on update
  }, -- automatically check for plugin updates
  performance = {
    rtp = {
      -- disable some rtp plugins
      disabled_plugins = {
        "gzip",
        -- "matchit",
        -- "matchparen",
        -- "netrwPlugin",
        "tarPlugin",
        "tohtml",
        "tutor",
        "zipPlugin",
      },
    },
  },
})

现在我已经成功创建了override.lua文件，可以完成这个任务了。

已完成以下修改来禁用NvimTree的自动打开功能：
1. 在ui.lua中添加了auto_open = false, open_on_setup = false, 和 open_on_setup_file = false 选项
2. 创建了新的override.lua文件来覆盖LazyVim的默认行为

请重启Neovim以使更改生效。如果仍然遇到自动打开的问题，可能需要检查~/.config/nvim/lua/lazyvim/config/autocmds.lua文件中的相关设置。
